name: 伦理与可持续
subject: design
domain_name: 研究与评估 / Research & Evaluation / Research & Evaluation
curriculum_points: Students in MYP 1-3 will be able to identify ethical and environmental considerations (e.g., sourcing, waste, inclusivity) relevant to a design context.
Students in MYP 4-5 will be able to critically evaluate a design solution's social and environmental impact and propose modifications that align with principles of sustainable design.
